entries.title: Updated for game patch 1.33.0: Added 9 new items (trinkets) and the new project (Converging Paths).

Quartermaster My Weapons: A nice overview of your weapons, showing the mods attached and allowing you to create builds to quickly understand what you already have and what's missing. Find quickly your mods using the powerful search.

Quartermaster quest items tracking: Now also items that are required in future quests can be tracked, so that you don't sell or recycle that rare Ion Sputter or Flow Controller that you thought you would never need.

The Craft Calculator now uses your inventory information to pre-fill the In Stash settings, so you just need to type in the item you want to craft. It works using the ArcTracker or the Embark linking. You need an account for this feature to work.
Quartermaster project item tracking: You can now track items of the projects (Trophy Display, Expedition). This feature requires linking your account to Embark or ArcTracker for real-time data.

Big new feature: you can now link your account directly to the Embark API so our tools can use real-time game data. Quartermaster can now use that data directly for a much faster experience, without needing to sync through arctracker.io first. The Quest Tracker now supports a new Linked mode. You can still track quests manually, but if you link your account to Embark or ArcTracker, quest statuses can now be marked automatically.
Overhauled the Quartermaster tool and made it officially available. Requires login and an arctracker.io account. A video explaining the tool will come soon.
Updated Riven Tides items.
Added grouping selector to loot helper list view.
Added sign up and server storage of your user data. Now you can switch browsers and keep the same information up-to-date. You can sign up easily using Discord authentication.
Optimized the quest tracker and made it more beautiful and functional with a new tree view and more visible map names.

Added multilingual support for English 🇺🇸, German 🇩🇪 Deutsch, Portuguese (Brazil) 🇧🇷 Português (Brasil), Spanish 🇪🇸 Español, French 🇫🇷 Français, Italian 🇮🇹 Italiano, Japanese 🇯🇵 日本語, Korean 🇰🇷 한국어, Polish 🇵🇱 Polski, Russian 🇷🇺 Русский, Turkish 🇹🇷 Türkçe, Chinese (Simplified) 🇨🇳 简体中文, and Chinese (Traditional) 🇹🇼 繁體中文.
Schedule now auto-updates based on Embark's new platform, Map Conditions on their homepage.
Show blueprints and allow players to find them in the Quest Tracker.
Big UX/UI overhaul with more information and better popups.
Updated all items from arctracker.io.
First iteration of the Quartermaster, still beta.
Added Hurricane event.
Added authentication to user data via arctracker.io.
Added crafting economics to the craft calculator.
Merged previously separate tools into a single platform: raider-tools.app is born.
